fields.description: Order Item'dagi "Sug'urta" summasi avtomatik Journal Entry'ga aylanganda DEBIT qilinadigan hisob (xarajat, Expense turidagi Account)
fields.label: Sug'urta xarajat hisobi (Debit)

fields.description: Xuddi shu Journal Entry'da KREDIT qilinadigan hisob (kreditor/majburiyat, Payable turidagi Account)
fields.label: Sug'urta kreditor hisobi (Credit)

fields.description: Agar yuqoridagi kreditor hisobi Payable/Receivable turida bo'lsa, ERPNext Journal Entry qatorida Party Type + Party talab qiladi — shu yerda bir marta belgilab qo'yiladi
fields.label: Kreditor Party Type
